splash.body: Now that you’ve had a chance to look at the core systems that we use in the life of a deal, let’s get you some practice! Let’s practice using the Avails Tool and Salesforce.

You have two goals in this lab:

  1. Pull avails using the Avails Tool
  2. Manage and document a campaign in Salesforce
Great question. We've created some specific resources to help you with this lab. Let's organize these resources as systems and documents.

The Avails Tool. This is one of the tools that Client Services uses for checking avails for individual lines. Slingshot is the other tool that Client Services uses to check avails for entire orders. In this lab, you’ll just need the Avails Tool.

Salesforce TOPS Classroom. This is a sandbox environment where you are free to explore, mess things up and get a good feel of Salesforce without messing up any live orders. This is also where your Unicorn Zombies opportunity.

Unicorn Zombies RFP. The ad agency sent over the RFP for the Unicorn Zombies campaign. Use this document to recommend a media mix of products, and to pull avails.

Unicorn Zombies Insertion Order. Fast-forward a bit. This is the client insertion order for the Unicorn Zombies campaign. Use this document to practice building your ad ops castle and managing the content section.

Click the link below to get your lab resources.

Lab Assets

Once you've completed your lab assignment, click the Continue button.

conclusion.body: Mate! You just completed your first lab! Wasn't too bad, innit? We've got a few more labs planned for you in the Freshman year!

The Scowl and Slouch badge!

This one is pretty rare. It was only handed out at a secret concert at a small pub in Liverpool a few years ago. Definitely a keeper!
